entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic olùkọ́ AI fún Deeper Understanding jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Yí èrò, àríyànjiyàn, ìṣòro, text, tàbí decision sí tó dojú kọ chain ti àwọn ìbéèrè. tirẹ buddy listens láti kọọkan ìdáhùn, maps àwọn ìròyìn-fífi-tẹ̀lẹ̀ àti àwọn àlàfo, àti pushes ìwọ toward tirẹ own ìkẹyìn synthesis. gbìmọ̀ wò: "ìrànlọ́wọ́ mi lóye iye ohun tí fi sílẹ̀."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Socratic ìkọ́ni jẹ́ kì í ṣe always ìdáhùn. bí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ní rárá ìpilẹ̀ ní gbogbo, short àlàyé lè jẹ́ kinder than ìbéèrè. bí wọ́n jẹ́ nínú crisis kí àkókò ipari, ìṣètò ipo like ìdánwò Prep Planner tàbí ìtọ́ni ipo like olùkọ́ iṣẹ́ ilé lè jẹ́ dára síi. bí àfojúsùn jẹ́ rírántí Àwọn Òfin, kaadi ìrántí Olùkọ́ jẹ́ síi tààrà.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Socraticing uses àwọn ìbéèrè, hypotheses, àwọn ìtọ́ni, àti reflection láti kọ́ jinlẹ̀ síi understanding than passive ìdáhùn kíkà.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ yìí ọ̀nà

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú "{value1}", lẹ́yìn náà fi kún kí ìwọ already mọ̀ àti ibo ìwọ jẹ́ stuck.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú mọ́ àlàyé

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú draft tàbí outline, béèrè fún one priority, ṣàtúnṣe yourself, lẹ́yìn náà lo speaking tàbí source àtúpalẹ̀ láti ṣàyẹ̀wò bóyá èrò jẹ́ mọ́ àti defensible.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú pillar cluster yẹn bá mu tirẹ iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́, ka one ìtọ́sọ́nà, lẹ́yìn náà ṣí linked gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ ipo láti yí advice sí adaṣe.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú short diagnostic quiz tàbí kókó confidence list, lẹ́yìn náà kọ́ ètò yí ká àwọn agbègbè yẹn ṣẹ̀dá most uncertainty.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú rọrùn àlàyé, pressure-test èrò pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, lẹ́yìn náà yí aláìlera àwọn ibi sí ìrántí aláṣiṣẹ́.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú rọrùn àlàyé, lẹ́yìn náà béèrè Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè títí ìwọ lè ṣàlàyé ó back.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú pato àfojúsùn such gẹ́gẹ́ bí "{value1}". ipo ṣiṣẹ́ tó dára jù nígbà tí ìwọ fi kún kí ìwọ already mọ̀, ibo ìwọ jẹ́ stuck, àti kí irú ti ìrànlọ́wọ́ ìwọ fẹ́.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kókó, assignment, draft, ìdánwò, tàbí èrò nínú ipo yẹn bá mu iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àwọn àpẹẹrẹ ìtọ́sọ́nà

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú example àwọn ìbéèrè.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú Learn Anything

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kọ́ Anything fún rọrùn àlàyé, olùkọ́ iṣẹ́ ilé fún stuck assignment, tàbí kaadi ìrántí Olùkọ́ nígbà tí àfojúsùn jẹ́ àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kọ́ Anything bí ìwọ ní kókó nínú mind. gbìyànjú Socratic Instruction bí ìwọ fẹ́ àwọn ìbéèrè dípò ti àlàyé. lo kaadi ìrántí Olùkọ́ nígbà tí ìwọ nílò láti rántí, tàbí ìdánwò Prep Planner nígbà tí ìṣòro jẹ́ organizing tirẹ ẹ̀kọ́ àkókò.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú kọ́ Anything nígbà tí ìwọ nílò orientation àti plain àlàyé.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú ìṣirò Step olùkọ́ fún equations tàbí worked solutions, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé fún assignments, àti olùkọ́ kaadi ìrántí nígbà tí ìwọ nílò láti rántí àwọn fọ́ọ̀mùlà tàbí aṣiṣe patterns.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú ọ̀kan tó mọ́ request

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú one wúlò ìtọ́sọ́nà, lẹ́yìn náà ṣí jọmọ́ gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ ipo so advice becomes adaṣe. yìí ẹ̀ka jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ fún {value1}

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú ibi, àkókò, ìdánimọ̀, àwọn ìdènà, àti àmì ẹ̀rí kí ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ náà má bà a di ere ipa gbogbogbò.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè yẹn pa mọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ active.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú gbangba ipo àlejò, lẹ́yìn náà shape ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀dà yí ká gidi nílò.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú gbangba guidance, lẹ́yìn náà ṣí right ipo.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú Talk láti Historical ènìyàn fún figure-led ìjíròrò. lo àkókò Travel fún ibi-and-period expedition. ka Talk láti Historical ènìyàn ìtọ́sọ́nà tàbí àkókò Travel àwọn ìbéèrè àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìyípo bí ìwọ fẹ́ síi tí a ṣètò ìṣàn iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú broadest ipo ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú ìtọ́sọ́nà yẹn tó dára jù bá mu iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ nínú front ti ìwọ.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Ìtàn-àròsọ olùkọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Yí àwọn èrò sí àwọn ìtàn-àròsọ, characters, conflicts, àti memorable scenes.

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti àwọn tí wọ́n ń kọ́ ara wọn tí wọ́n nílò ètò láìsọ ètò náà di àkójọ àwọn ohun tí kò ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò tààrà ìrànlọ́wọ́, àwọn olùkọ́ nílò tó dojú kọ ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí, leaders nílò ní ojúṣe ìdásílẹ̀ àwọn ọ̀nà, àti partners nílò tó mọ́ ways láti fund ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò fast ìrànlọ́wọ́, ṣùgbọ́n ìrànlọ́wọ́ síbẹ̀ ní láti leave thinking nínú tiwọn hands. inspir àwọn ọ̀nà wọ́pọ̀ ẹ̀kọ́ moments sí dojú kọ gbangba àwọn ipo dípò ti one gbogbogbò ìdáhùn box.
